stats.label: Heart Loss
stats.note: Any death removes exactly one heart.

stats.label: Heart Gain
stats.note: Killing a player restores one heart.

description.tagline: Lose hearts on death, regain them only by killing, and face permanent exile at zero.
description.title: Heart System

logo.subtitle: Death drains hearts; only PvP restores them, leading to permanent exile.
logo.title: Heart System
